notes: Two-rule fixture: (1) TQ-1 'kah' suffix on 'siapa' → 'siapakah' (formal who?), null-target — English doesn't need a question marker, word order + '?' do the work; (2) TQ-3 gender-neutral 'dia → they'. English 'Who are they?' uses singular 'they' since Indonesian dia is gender-unspecified. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: 'Who is that?' might be more natural if the referent is visually known; this fixture assumes the speaker is asking about an unknown person.
